property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\jdk-21.0.2\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\jdk-21.0.2\bin;C:\jdk-21.0.2\bin;C:\jdk-21.0.2\bin;C:\jdk-21.0.2\bin;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-17.0.15.6-hotspot\bin;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-17.0.15.6-hotspot\bin;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jre-17.0.15.6-hotspot\bin;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-11.0.26.4-hotspot\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\150\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\Client SDK\ODBC\170\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft SQL Server\160\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\160\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\160\DTS\Binn\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files (x86)\Windows Kits\10\Windows Performance Toolkit\;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\lib\maven\apache-maven-3.9.11\bin;C:\Users\carla\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\Scripts\;C:\Users\carla\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0\bin\;C:\Users\carla\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\carla\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\carla\AppData\Local\JetBrains\Toolbox\scripts;C:\Users\carla\AppData\Local\Programs\mongosh\;C:\Users\carla\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\carla\.dotnet\tools;C:\Users\carla\Downloads\maven-mvnd-1.0.3-windows-amd64\maven-mvnd-1.0.3-windows-amd64\bin;C:\Users\carla\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\carla\.deno\bin;.

testcase.name: Create a new bank account
testcase.system-out:
2026-06-26T11:48:18.116+02:00 INFO 10224 --- [ main] t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils : Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [fr.carla.bank.bdd.BankAccountStepDefinitions]: BankAccountStepDefinitions does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2026-06-26T11:48:18.138+02:00 INFO 10224 --- [ main] .b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper : Found @SpringBootConfiguration fr.carla.bank.BankAccountApiApplication for test class fr.carla.bank.bdd.BankAccountStepDefinitions
Scenario: Create a new bank account &amp#27;[90m# features/bank_account.feature:3&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe bank contains no accounts&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# fr.carla.bank.bdd.BankAccountStepDefinitions.theBankContainsNoAccounts()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32ma customer creates account &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"ACC001"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m for holder &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Carla"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# fr.carla.bank.bdd.BankAccountStepDefinitions.aCustomerCreatesAccount(java.lang.String,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32maccount &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"ACC001"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m is created&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# fr.carla.bank.bdd.BankAccountStepDefinitions.accountIsCreated(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32maccount &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"ACC001"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m has a balance of &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m0.00&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# fr.carla.bank.bdd.BankAccountStepDefinitions.accountHasBalance(java.lang.String,double)&amp#27;[0m
